choose_token.title: API Token Options
choose_token.description: Choose how you would like to proceed with the API token.

error.cannot_resolve_ip: Could not locate device automatically on local network. Ensure it is powered on and connected to the same Wi-Fi network.

init.title: Tinxy Local Options
init.description: Configure advanced settings for Tinxy Local integration.

data_description.host: Local IP address of the Tinxy device
data_description.request_timeout: Timeout in seconds for HTTP requests to Tinxy devices. Default is 3 seconds. Increase if you have slow network connections.
data_description.polling_interval: How often to poll devices for status updates. Default is 6 seconds. Must be greater than or equal to request timeout. Lower values provide faster updates but increase network traffic.

error.polling_less_than_timeout: Polling interval must be greater than or equal to request timeout
